_comment: Home-page tile registry — the organisms UniOme knows about. An entry needs the identifiers known at registration: taxid, nickname, keggid, and `name` (a human-readable label shown on the tile before the data is downloaded — the precise species/strain still comes from the enriched DB once ready). Everything else lives in the org's infra folder scripts/organisms/<taxid>_<nickname>/organism.json: cross-DB ids (stringSpecies, speciesTaxid, paxdbSpecies) and the availability/download info (available, url, bytes). Committed (un-ignored in .gitignore) even though it lives under the otherwise-gitignored resources/.
